sections.markdown:
- Activity: Stitch 2 Me 0
- Started: 2025-04-22 06:36
- Distance: 6.7 km
- Moving time: 35:57
- Elapsed time: 36:00
- Elevation gain: 45.8 m
- Average heart rate: 175.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 188 bpm
- Average watts: 216.3 W
- Average speed: 11.2 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `171.3 bpm`, ranging from `164.1` to `180.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `175.7 bpm` and second-half average HR was `167.1 bpm` (-8.6 bpm), which came down late rather than drifting upward.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `154.7 spm`, with a working range of `100.0` to `170.8 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `169.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `143.5 spm` (-26.1 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:21 /km` across `6.728 km` in `35:57` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `4:57 /km` and second-half pace was `5:44 /km` (+48 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `175.7 bpm` average and `188 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `172.4 bpm` in the first half and `178.3 bpm` in the second (+6.0 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `35:57` out of `36:00` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `9` stop segments and `2.2%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `64.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.6 m` and `20.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `29.2 m` in the first half and `34.8 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
